title: Add Inception Labs Mercury (diffusion architecture) as AIModelFamily ordinal 13
description: `AIModelFamilyInferenceArchitecture.diffusion` slot was reserved when the table shipped 2026-05-26, but no current row carries `diffusion` as inference architecture. Mercury (Inception Labs, 2024) is the first commercial diffusion language model and should be the catalog's first diffusion entry. Append at ordinal 13 (next-available, append-only per the freeze doctrine). Verify Mercury's current genotype: API access via Inception Labs API → `apiAvailable`; closed weights → `weightsLicenseTier = closed`; hosted-only → `archProfile = none`; provider-dependent durability; `diffusion` inference architecture; modalities likely text-out + tool-use only. Also worth tracking: `databricks-dbrx` (ordinal 14?), `ai21-jamba` (state-space-transformer hybrid, exercises the `hybrid` enum value), `stability-stable-lm`. Per `[[ordinality-table-entries-immutable-once-released]]` the table is in state 1 (pre-shipped) so renumber-free append is safe. Add doctrine tests in `AIModelFamilyDoctrineTests.swift` for the new entries.
